parsed.rationale: No evaluable evidence exists for UI/UX quality. The evidence directory contains only lighthouse-summary.json (performance 0.88, accessibility 0.98-1.0 — explicitly noted as 'for context only, they have their own weight') and axe-summary.json (skipped: 'no axe spec in candidate'). The screenshots/ directory is empty. The rubric requires screenshots of every page in three states, captures of the checkout flow and a modal interaction, and rendered HTML of two representative pages — none of which are present. Without any visual or structural evidence, no criterion from the rubric can be assessed; the score defaults to 1 (Unusable) as there is zero demonstration of UI/UX design.
